iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 20 Hour 17: DETERRENT. Gabbard Senate hearing (Mar 18): IC assessed enrichment 'obliterated' in 2025 strikes, Iran NOT rebuilding prior to war. Regime 'intact but largely degraded'. IAEA Grossi: does NOT know status of new underground Isfahan enrichment facility — inspectors haven't accessed it. Key uncertainty. Iran enriched to 60% pre-war. No evidence of bomb-building. Iran FM warns 'zero restraint' if infrastructure struck again. IAEA says strikes can't eliminate nuclear program. Updated 2026-03-19T15:49:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: IMMINENT. Day 20 of US-Israel war on Iran. Iran intensifies Gulf energy strikes: SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit — targeting Saudi westward bypass route. Two Kuwait refineries ablaze. Ras Laffan LNG extensively damaged. Vessels burning off UAE/Qatar. Brent $118 intraday (peaked $126 earlier). Analysts say $200/barrel not far-fetched. Iranian FM warns 'zero restraint' if infrastructure struck again. Hegseth: 'US controls fate of Iran', regime 'intact but largely degraded'. 1,444+ Iranian deaths. Arab League condemns 'dangerous escalation'. Updated 2026-03-19T15:49:00Z

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: US 'controls the fate of Iran', more IRGC/Basij leaders targeted
latest_news.text: Hegseth says US military 'controls the fate of Iran'. Implies more IRGC/Basij senior leaders will be killed: 'The last job anyone in the world wants right now, senior leader for the IRGC or Basij.'

latest_news.headline: Iran strikes set vessel ablaze off UAE coast, another damaged off Qatar
latest_news.text: A vessel was set ablaze off the UAE coast and another damaged off Qatar, underscoring danger to shipping in the region as Hormuz remains effectively closed.

latest_news.headline: Brent crude spikes to $118, European gas prices doubled in past month
latest_news.text: Brent crude hit $118/barrel (up 60% since war began). European natural gas benchmark doubled in past month. Energy crisis deepening globally.

latest_news.headline: US drops 5,000-lb bunker busters on underground Iranian weapon facilities
latest_news.text: Gen. Dan Caine confirms US forces using 5,000-lb bunker buster bombs on underground weapon-storage facilities. Warplanes hunting Iranian boats in Hormuz, helicopters striking Iranian drones.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: IMMINENT. Israel-Lebanon ground invasion ongoing. Litani River bridges destroyed. 450K Israeli reservists mobilized. Ground ops on multiple axes. 968+ killed, 1M+ displaced. Central Beirut strikes continuing. IDF says troops will stay for months. No ceasefire signals. Updated 2026-03-19T15:49:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 16: DETERRENT. No new Turkey-specific developments. 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began. NATO Patriot deployment at Incirlik active. Coupling from Iran keeps Turkey elevated. Updated 2026-03-19T15:47:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 9% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 16: DETERRENT. No new developments. Border tension with Pakistan ongoing but contained. Updated 2026-03-19T15:47:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 6% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 16: DETERRENT. Arms supply to Iran ongoing. Oil price boost to Russian revenue. No direct ME intervention. Ukraine front active but no NATO-Russia incident. Updated 2026-03-19T15:47:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 44% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: CRITICAL. Peace talks paused due to Iran war. Russia plans 409,000 additional troops in 2026. Ukraine liberated 400+ km2 in Zaporizhia. Lavrov rejects settlement without full territorial concessions. Oil price surge boosts Russian revenue. 34-nation coalition supporting Ukraine. Turkey offers to host next negotiation round. Updated 2026-03-19T15:49:00Z

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 43% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 20 Hour 17: CRITICAL. Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Mediated by Saudi Arabia, Turkey, Qatar. Both sides warn: any cross-border attack/drone/terror incident = immediate resumption. No ceasefire path underlying. Post-Eid fighting expected. Updated 2026-03-19T15:49:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23 — temporary only, post-Eid fighting expected. Iran war Day 20 at maximum tempo: energy infrastructure strikes escalating globally, Brent $118+, analysts warn $200. Iran 'zero restraint' threat raises risk of wider Gulf war drawing Saudi/UAE into direct combat. IAEA uncertainty on Isfahan underground facility adds nuclear dimension concern despite Gabbard's 'obliterated enrichment' testimony. Russia-Ukraine talks stalled. Watch: post-Eid Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire expiry Mar 23. Watch: Brent crossing $120 sustained. Watch: Saudi Arabia military response to SAMREF strike. Watch: Iran 'zero restraint' implementation if further strikes occur.

latest_news.headline: US strikes 90+ targets on Kharg Island, oil infrastructure spared
latest_news.text: Gen. Dan Caine confirms US forces struck more than 90 targets on Kharg Island. Military sites 'obliterated' but oil infrastructure left alone. Trump threatens to strike oil 'for fun' if Iran doesn't comply.

latest_news.headline: Hegseth: 'Iran's 11 submarines are gone', US 'controls the fate of Iran'
latest_news.text: SecDef Hegseth: 'The United States military controls the fate of that country. Iran has the ability to make the right choices.' Confirms all 11 Iranian submarines destroyed.

latest_news.headline: Gabbard: IC assessed Iran enrichment 'obliterated', was NOT rebuilding
latest_news.text: DNI Gabbard testified Iran's nuclear enrichment was 'obliterated' in 2025 strikes and IC assessed Iran was NOT rebuilding it prior to war. Declined to call it 'imminent nuclear threat' — said only president can determine.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials say US helped coordinate South Pars gasfield strike
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters the US actually helped coordinate Israel's attack on Iran's South Pars gasfield — contradicting Trump administration's attempt to distance from the strike.

latest_news.headline: Iranian missile kills 3 in West Bank — first Palestinian deaths from Iranian fire
latest_news.text: Iranian attack kills at least 3 in the Israeli-occupied West Bank — first Palestinian casualties from Iranian strikes since the war began.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine liberates 400+ km² in Zaporizhia oblast
latest_news.text: Ukrainian forces reportedly liberated over 400 square kilometers in the Oleksandrivka and Hulyaipole directions from late January to mid-March 2026 in two separate drives.

latest_news.headline: US intelligence: China not planning Taiwan invasion in 2027
latest_news.text: US intelligence community 2026 assessment: China does not currently plan to invade Taiwan in 2027 and seeks to control island without force. PLA making 'steady but uneven progress' on Taiwan-related capabilities.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 15:49 UTC) — (1) Iran intensifies Gulf energy strikes: SAMREF refinery (Yanbu), Kuwait refineries, Ras Laffan LNG extensively damaged; (2) Brent $118 (peaked $126), analysts say $200/barrel 'not far-fetched'; (3) Iran FM warns 'zero restraint' if infrastructure struck again; (4) Hegseth: US 'controls Iran's fate', regime 'intact but largely degraded'; (5) IAEA does NOT know status of new Isfahan underground enrichment facility; (6) Gabbard: Iran enrichment 'obliterated', NOT rebuilding, no imminent nuclear threat; (7) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23; (8) Russia-Ukraine talks paused, Russia plans 409K new troops; (9) China NOT planning Taiwan 2027 invasion per US IC; (10) Gabbard Threat Assessment: Russia/China/DPRK/Iran/Pakistan missiles can reach US homeland.
